message:
feat(test): expand proptest coverage for alerts, concurrent_map, content_dedup, exp_histogram, lru_cache

Add behavioral invariant tests: alert level ordering, monitor operations,
sharded map containment, content hash format, histogram stats, LRU cache
stats/capacity. Each file expanded from 30 to 37 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
